providerAuthChoices.groupHint: Distributed local inference — zero cloud, zero data leakage

providerAuthChoices.choiceLabel: Hive Local Gateway (no API key needed)
providerAuthChoices.groupHint: Connect to your local Hive swarm

hiveUrl.description: Hive gateway URL. Default: https://hive.geiant.com for cloud, http://localhost:8080 for local.

hiveJurisdiction.description: H3 cell for jurisdiction binding (e.g., 8a1f9e22d2c7fff for Rome)

hiveGnsIdentity.description: GNS public key (Ed25519 hex) to bind agent to an identity
